build.beforeDevCommand: powershell -Command "if (Test-Path ../dist) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force ../dist }; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path ../dist; Copy-Item ../control_panel.html ../dist/; Copy-Item -Recurse ../modules ../dist/; Copy-Item -Recurse ../overlays ../dist/; Copy-Item -Recurse ../js ../dist/; Copy-Item -Recurse ../css ../dist/"
build.beforeBuildCommand: powershell -Command "if (Test-Path ../dist) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force ../dist }; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path ../dist; Copy-Item ../control_panel.html ../dist/; Copy-Item -Recurse ../modules ../dist/; Copy-Item -Recurse ../overlays ../dist/; Copy-Item -Recurse ../js ../dist/; Copy-Item -Recurse ../css ../dist/"
